problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region
hypothesis: The key to What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? is Glial cell activation/suppression in target brain region — specifically Glial cell activation/suppression — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
